privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a purely synthetic dummy JAR file created on the user's Desktop at /home/ga/Desktop/acme_db_driver_v2.5.jar during initialization. The target deployment repository is example-repo-local. The expected deployment path for the JAR follows Maven conventions (com/acme/db/driver/2.5.0/driver-2.5.0.jar) using the Group ID 'com.acme.db', Artifact ID 'driver', and Version '2.5.0'. An identically placed POM file is expected to be generated automatically alongside it.
